fields.name: Analysis Area
fields.tooltip:
Contains the application area that the analysis view belongs to:
Sales: The analysis view filter was set up for Sales & Receivables
Purchase: The analysis view filter was set up for Purchases & Payables
Inventory: The analysis view filter was set up for Inventory

fields.name: Analysis View Code
fields.tooltip: Contains the code for the analysis view that the filter belongs to.

fields.name: Dimension Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a dimension code that the dimension value filter will be linked to.

fields.name: Dimension Value Filter
fields.tooltip: Specifies the dimension value that the analysis view is based on.
